name: Brotherhood of the Fire Fist - Rooster
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>立</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>りつ</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>炎</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>えん</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>星</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>せい</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>－トウケイ
desc: When this card is Special Summoned by the effect of a "Fire Fist" monster: You can add 1 "Fire Fist" monster from your Deck to your hand. You can only use this effect of "Brotherhood of the Fire Fist - Rooster" once per turn. Once per turn: You can send 1 face-up "Fire Formation" Spell/Trap you control to the GY; Set 1 "Fire Formation" Spell/Trap directly from your Deck.
mnst_eff: When this card is Special Summoned by the effect of a "Fire Fist" monster: You can add 1 "Fire Fist" monster from your Deck to your hand. You can only use this effect of "Brotherhood of the Fire Fist - Rooster" once per turn. Once per turn: You can send 1 face-up "Fire Formation" Spell/Trap you control to the GY; Set 1 "Fire Formation" Spell/Trap directly from your Deck.

action: Sends from field to Graveyard for cost
